Title: Bernard Arnault's business-first strategy with foreign heads of state, from Trump to Putin

Title: Louvre heist gallery to reopen to the public

Title: Orléans museum launches 'Wanted' campaign to track down 424 looted artworks
Description: Nearly 85 years after Nazi forces looted its collections, the Orléans Museum of Fine Arts is turning to auctioneers, notaries and collectors to help recover the paintings and drawings still missing.

Description: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (2/6). LVMH's boss has never hidden his allegiance to France's pro-business, establishment right. He's close to fellow billionaire Vincent Bolloré and, above all, pragmatic. Now he's preparing for the far right's rise to power.

Title: Climate scientists aren't surprised by summer's record heat: 'We've entered a dangerous zone'
Description: Record heat, historic drought and sweeping wildfires have marked France's 2026 summer. Yet climate scientists mostly see global warming's expected effects playing out. Only the rapid succession of heatwaves has caught them off guard.
